key_insight: Short carbon fiber-reinforced polymer (SCFRP) composites exploit the intrinsic conductivity of the carbon fiber network for self-sensing, yet no predictive model couples their anisotropic, rate-dependent fracture to piezoresistive damage identification.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: fracture and damage workflows and research evaluation.

paper_title: Data-Driven Structural Health Monitoring of Short Carbon Fiber-Reinforced Polymer Composites via Multiphysics Phase-Field Simulation
